data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for an audit trail of exports.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the audit trail for exports, specifically who was exported and when. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for an audit trail but does not demonstrate its implementation or validation in the current saga run, indicating a gap in the evidence.
gaps: No evidence of validation for the audit trail of who was exported and when.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the audit trail requirement.
